title: 3D Model Project Metadata
description: Per-project metadata for 3D printable model collections.

license.description: SPDX license identifier override (repo default is implied when absent).

hardware.description: Bill of materials for non-printed parts.

relatedModels.description: Directory names of related projects in this repo.

mating_pairs.description: Pairs of STL filenames (as rendered) that must fit together without geometric overlap.

complex_interior.description: Whether this model has significant interior cavities that a single isometric thumbnail cannot adequately convey. When true, CI renders additional orthographic views (top, bottom, front) alongside the standard isometric thumbnail.

assembly.description: Declares this project ships a composite preview: existing part STLs rendered together, each in a fixed colour. Replaces a monochrome merged-assembly STL for viewing.

stl.description: The rendered STL basename whose viewer card this composite replaces (e.g. "assembly.stl").
